case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFIORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $253.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFIORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $253.00 U.S. CURRENCY; $2,062.00 U.S. CURRENCY; $6,374.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF TODD HUNTER, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFIORNIA HEARING SET FOR APR-28-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY CLAIMANT HUNTER, TODD
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT AS TO TODD HUNTER ONLY FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFIORNIA HUNTER, TODD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFIORNIA MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF TODD HUNTER. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR, AS MOOT. AMENDED CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED 4/19/2010. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; COURT REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT AS TO PHILIP SERAFINO ONLY FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFIORNIA SERAFINO, PHILIP
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-28-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT AS TO ANDREW BYRD ONLY FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFIORNIA BYRD, ANDREW

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO TODD HUNTER ONLY. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,062.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT TODD HUNTER. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO ANDREW BYRD ONLY. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $6,374.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY ROBERT AMPARAN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT ANDREW BYRD. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
